::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {.flex-grow role="main"}
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {.flex .min-h-full .flex-col .justify-center .py-6 .sm:py-12 .px-4 .sm:px-6 .lg:px-8}
:::::::: {.mx-auto .w-full .max-w-[480px] .flex .items-center .justify-between .sm:justify-center}
::: {.ml-2 .sm:ml-0 .sm:absolute .sm:top-4 .sm:left-4}
[[![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,){.inline-block}]{.relative
.z-[1] .inline-flex .items-center .justify-center .w-full .gap-1
.transition-[transform]}](../uk.html "Головна сторінка"){.btn .btn
.btn-md .btn-secondary}
:::

:::::: {.flex .items-center .justify-center .w-full .gap-2}
![](../images/content-public/logos/logo-new-mobile-2xb3ce.png?id=7ad5648bfd86ae2e8524147a72877c64){.max-w-[100px]
.sm:max-w-[200px]
srcset="/images/content-public/logos/logo-new-mobile-3x.png 2x"
width="188" height="128"}

::::: {.mt-2 .sm:mt-8 .text-center .sm:text-left}

::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {.mx-auto .w-full .max-w-[480px]}

::::::::::::::::::::::::: {.px-6 .py-6 .sm:px-12 .sm:py-12 .rounded .sm:rounded-xl .bg-white/95 .dark:bg-[#ffffff05] .backdrop-blur-sm .shadow-[0_10px_50px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)] .dark:shadow-[0_10px_60px_rgba(0,0,0,0.7)]}
::::: {.sm:-mt-3 .sm:-mx-3 .p-[1px] .mb-6 .rounded .sm:rounded-full .bg-gradient-to-b .from-yellow-200 .to-yellow-500 .dark:from-yellow-200 .dark:to-yellow-800}
:::: {.px-3 .pr-2 .py-2 .flex .justify-between .items-center .rounded .sm:rounded-full .bg-yellow-50 .dark:bg-yellow-400}

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,){.inline-block
.mr-2} Ще не реєструвалися?

.text-nowrap type="submit"}

.focus-visible:outline-solid .focus-visible:outline-primary-500 .rounded
.px-1 .py-1 .active:pb-1.5 .active:pt-2.5}

:::::::::: {.flex .flex-row .mt-4 .sm:mt-8 .mb-4}

</div>

:::: {.-mx-6 .sm:-mx-12 .px-4 .sm:px-12 .-mb-6 .sm:-mb-12 .py-6 .rounded-b .sm:rounded-b-xl .mt-4 .sm:mt-8 .border .border-[#0001] .dark:border-[#fff1] .bg-[#0001] .dark:bg-[#fff1]}
::: {.text-center .text-sm .text-[#0008] .dark:text-[#fff8] .[&>a]:underline .[&>a]:outline-none .[&>a]:focus-visible:outline-solid .[&>a]:outline-[#0006] .dark:[&>a]:outline-[#fff6]}
Натискаючи будь-яку з наведених вище кнопок авторизації, ви погоджуєтеся
з [Умовами](terms.html) та [Політикою
конфіденційності](privacy-policy.html).
:::
